title: Vampire Survivors
edition_pinned: Vampire Survivors 1.0 full release baseline (poncle / Luca Galante; post-EA Steam) — auto-attack + gold meta as design-canonical, not later DLC crossovers
moat: Movement-only control with timed auto-attacks turns positioning and upgrade picks into the whole skill axis.

loop_skeleton.description: Move through a timed stage while weapons fire on cooldowns, collect XP gems to choose weapons/passives, evolve combos, die or hit the stage timer, then spend gold between runs to unlock characters and permanent power.

depth_mechanisms.name: auto-attack strips aim
depth_mechanisms.mechanism: Attacks fire on fixed timers without a fire button so the player only aims by position and facing rules; attention shifts to pathing through swarms and reading attack cadences.
depth_mechanisms.falsifiable_claim: If manual aiming is required for every shot, average session length for casual players falls and the exercise-bike / chat-while-playing use case (creator intent) fails.

depth_mechanisms.name: level-up build fork
depth_mechanisms.mechanism: Each level presents a random subset of weapons and passives; evolutions require specific weapon+passive pairs at max rank, so runs diverge into named combos rather than pure stat stacking.
depth_mechanisms.falsifiable_claim: If every level-up is a free choice of any unlock with no evolution recipes, build identity collapses and second-session experimentation with new combos drops.

depth_mechanisms.name: gold meta unlock ladder
depth_mechanisms.mechanism: Gold earned in runs buys permanent PowerUp upgrades and unlocks characters/weapons; free re-spec of PowerUps lets players reallocate gold paths without a new save.
depth_mechanisms.falsifiable_claim: If gold cannot buy permanent unlocks between runs, return rate after first death falls because a failed run produces no lasting progress.

feel_signature: A move commit repositions the auto-fire cone; a level-up pause forces a pick among three options that rewrite the next minutes of swarm control.
second_session_answer: Players return to spend gold on PowerUps and try a newly unlocked character or weapon evolution path, not to re-watch cutscenes.
packaging_lessons: Ship one stage, a handful of weapons, and gold unlocks before multiplayer or narrative arcs — creator designed for short bike sessions.
Keep attack automatic from day one so the skill surface is pathing and build picks only.
anti_lessons: Do not add real-money gacha to the gold ladder — the gambling-inspired balance is about run reward pacing, not cash shops.
Do not copy survivor-likes by only adding auto-fire to an existing twin-stick without timed swarm pressure and evolution recipes.

system_bom.note: move → auto-hit → XP → level pick is the in-run cycle
weapons, passives, and stage chests are the run loot
gems from kills drive the level-up cadence
level-ups are the primary decision points
gold PowerUps and character unlocks persist across deaths
death ends the run but converts gold; timer survival is the stage win

citations.claim: moat/auto-attack: Galante designed attacks as automatic so the player could concentrate on something else (bike, chat).
depth_mechanisms.level-up build fork and auto timers: attacks trigger at intervals; upgrades raise frequency, power, range; gold meta between runs.
depth_mechanisms.gold meta unlock ladder: free reset of upgraded builds to re-spend gold.
feel_signature: player moves; weapons auto-fire; level-ups unlock weapons and upgrades; ~30 minute survival goal.
packaging Pac-Man power cadence inspiration (safe → empowered → safe) cited by creator.
